label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Jennifer woke up at 5am. Then, Richard saw her working at the office from 5am to 8am. So that's from 5 to 8 in the morning. Then there's a gap until Samantha saw her at the library from 12pm to 1pm. Wait, between 8am and 12pm, what was she doing? The problem doesn't say. Then Betty saw her at the bike shop from 1pm to 2pm. Then Sarah saw her at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm. After that, Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. And the swimming pool closed after 10pm. So the question is, between what times could Jennifer have gone to the swimming pool? The options are A) 8am-12pm, B) 9pm-10pm, C) 2pm-9pm, D) 12pm-1pm. Let me map out her schedule: - 5am: Wakes up - 5am-8am: At office (with Richard) - 8am-12pm: Unaccounted for (no one saw her) - 12pm-1pm: At library (with Samantha) - 1pm-2pm: At bike shop (with Betty) - 2pm-9pm: At electronics store (with Sarah) - 9pm-10pm: Walking to Statue of Liberty (with Thomas) - After 10pm: Pool closed So the swimming pool must be open before 10pm, and she can't be doing
